references.hebrew: כִּ֚י אִם־לִשְׁאֵר֔וֹ הַקָּרֹ֖ב אֵלָ֑יו לְאִמּ֣וֹ וּלְאָבִ֔יו וְלִבְנ֥וֹ וּלְבִתּ֖וֹ וּלְאָחִֽיו׃
references.english: except for the relatives that are closest to him: his mother, his father, his son, his daughter, and his brother;
references.matched_snippet: לה מנלן דכתיב כי אם לשארו הקרוב אליו

references.english: But he shall not defile himself as a kinsman by marriage,aas a kinsman by marriage Lit. “as a husband among his kin”; meaning uncertain. and so profane himself.
references.matched_snippet: בעל בעמיו להחלו יש בעל שמיטמא ויש

references.hebrew: דַּבֵּ֛ר אֶל־בְּנֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל לֵאמֹ֑ר בַּחֹ֨דֶשׁ הַשְּׁבִיעִ֜י בְּאֶחָ֣ד לַחֹ֗דֶשׁ יִהְיֶ֤ה לָכֶם֙ שַׁבָּת֔וֹן זִכְר֥וֹן תְּרוּעָ֖ה מִקְרָא־קֹֽדֶשׁ׃
references.english: Speak to the Israelite people thus: In the seventh month, on the first day of the month, you shall observe complete rest, a sacred occasion commemorated with loud blasts.

references.hebrew: וְהִקְרַבְתֶּ֨ם עוֹלָ֜ה לְרֵ֤יחַ נִיחֹ֙חַ֙ לַֽיהֹוָ֔ה פָּרִ֧ים בְּנֵי־בָקָ֛ר שְׁנַ֖יִם אַ֣יִל אֶחָ֑ד שִׁבְעָ֥ה כְבָשִׂ֖ים בְּנֵ֥י שָׁנָֽה׃
references.english: You shall present a burnt offering of pleasing odor to G<small>OD</small>: two bulls of the herd, one ram, seven yearling lambs.

references.hebrew: וּלְקַחְתֶּ֨ם לָכֶ֜ם בַּיּ֣וֹם הָרִאשׁ֗וֹן פְּרִ֨י עֵ֤ץ הָדָר֙ כַּפֹּ֣ת תְּמָרִ֔ים וַעֲנַ֥ף עֵץ־עָבֹ֖ת וְעַרְבֵי־נָ֑חַל וּשְׂמַחְתֶּ֗ם לִפְנֵ֛י יְהֹוָ֥ה אֱלֹהֵיכֶ֖ם שִׁבְעַ֥ת יָמִֽים׃
references.english: On the first day you shall take the product of hadarehadar Exact meaning of Heb. hadar uncertain. Traditionally the product is understood as “citron.” trees, branches of palm trees, boughs of leafyfleafy Meaning of Heb. ʻaboth uncertain. trees, and willows of the brook, and you shall rejoice before the ETERNAL your God seven days.

references.hebrew: נָבִ֨יא מִקִּרְבְּךָ֤ מֵאַחֶ֙יךָ֙ כָּמֹ֔נִי יָקִ֥ים לְךָ֖ יְהֹוָ֣ה אֱלֹהֶ֑יךָ אֵלָ֖יו תִּשְׁמָעֽוּן׃
references.english: From among your own people, the E<small>TERNAL</small> your God will raise up for you a prophet like myself—whom you shall heed.
references.matched_snippet: אליו תשמעון אפילו אומר לך עבור על
